Definition: Size and shape of the procoracoid cartilages
Size and shape of the clavicles
Presence or absence of the omasternum
The ratio of finger pad width to toe pad width
Type of connection between scapula and procoracoid, either ligamentous or cartilaginous
Relative length of 5th toe compared to length of 3rd toe (5<3, 5=3, 5>3)
Degree of webbing based on how high toe webs reach on the 5th toe (none, basally webbed, well webbed)
Tympanum diameter relative to eye diameter (¼, ⅓, or ½)
Whether two horizontal palatal folds in front of the pharynx are present
